title: rhynchosia klotzschii
intro: Rhynchosia klotzschii, also known as the Klotzsch's rhynchosia or wild bean, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is a woody climber or shrub native to tropical Africa, commonly found in woodland and grassland habitats. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. Rhynchosia klotzschii has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and has also been used to prepare herbal teas and infusions for its health benefits.
